description_long: This is a rectangular, upright trash bin with a predominantly green color scheme and a flat, slightly overhanging lid featuring a large, black, triangular opening for waste disposal. The front panel displays the SCANIA logo in white on a dark green band, with a prominent message in Portuguese: 'SEU LIXO TEM MAIS VALOR DO QUE VOCÊ IMAGINA,' suggesting an environmental or recycling initiative. Below the message, there is a graphic of a BIO-labeled item and a small recycling symbol, reinforcing its use for biodegradable or recyclable waste. The sides and back of the bin are similarly styled, with subtle line art illustrations of various recyclable items in the background. The bin appears to be made of sturdy plastic, suitable for outdoor or public urban environments. There are no visible handles or wheels, and the design is clean and modern, intended for easy public use.
description: A green, rectangular trash bin with a flat lid, triangular opening, and SCANIA branding, designed for biodegradable or recyclable waste. Features clear signage and a modern, sturdy appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the SCANIA logo, environmental message, and BIO symbol with the triangular opening clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view from the front-left, still showing the main signage and opening but with more side panel visible.
description_view_2: Left-side view, similar to the front but with the signage and opening slightly angled, revealing more of the left panel's background illustrations.
description_view_3: Back-left view, showing the rear and left side with less prominent signage, focusing on the overall shape and color scheme.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: SCANIA logo, environmental message in Portuguese, BIO symbol, recycling symbol, and background illustrations
